reviews.comment:
Por segundo año consecutivo q vengo a el lubricentro de esta sede no tiene aceite 10W-40. Si no preguntas antes no te avisan. Por segunda vez tengo que ir a buscar a otro lado

(Translated by Google)
For the second year in a row, the lube shop at this location hasn't had 10W-40 oil. They don't tell you if you don't ask beforehand. For the second time, I have to go somewhere else to find it.

reviews.comment:
Un solo playero! 5 horas para cargar y encima se puso hacer de mecánica con un señor !!!
Gracias! Esto fue hoy 10/11 22hs!

(Translated by Google)
Just one gas station attendant! It took 5 hours to charge, and on top of that, he started doing mechanical work for a guy!
Thanks! This was today, November 10th, at 10 PM!

reviews.comment:
Es difícil sino imposible conectarse a la Red WiFi del socio de ACA; podrían mejorar eso o proveer el acceso de Internet público a través de YPF Serviclub. Sobre todo si uno va a efectuar el pago del combustible a través de la aplicación de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Connecting to the ACA partner's Wi-Fi network is difficult, if not impossible; they could improve this or provide public internet access through YPF Serviclub. This is especially important if you're paying for fuel through the YPF app.

reviewReply.comment: Si mil disculpas estuvimos con problemas en la app que no depende de nosotros pero estamos tratando de solucionar gracias

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGdTVuZFpBEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGdmR6dm1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
En el día de la fecha como siempre siendo cliente habitual nuevamente fui atendido de muy mala manera, ayer pedí 4000$ y el nunca me ofreció limpieza de vidrios o medios de pago, a todo esto el muchacho cargo 5600 por qué yo detuve el pico porque el mismo op se retiro par a charlar con otro cliente. Hoy me rebalso la moto al pedirle tanque lleno. La verdad una pena que atiendan de tan mala manera en una estación tan linda y del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Today, as always, being a regular customer, I was once again treated very poorly. Yesterday, I asked for $4,000, and he never offered me window cleaning or any payment options. In addition, the guy charged me $5,600 because I stopped the ride because the operator himself had left to chat with another customer. Today, he overfilled my bike when I asked for a full tank. It's truly a shame that the service is so poor at such a nice ACA station.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos lo ocurrido le pedimos disculpas y tomaros las acciones pertinentes saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGM1pLd0pREAE
